title: Sour Crunchy Russian Bread Flatbread
description: A quick, crunchy flatbread with a tangy sourdough base and a fragrant bhuna spice blend, perfect for a post-workout snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour and kosher salt.
In a separate container, mix the sourdough starter, warm water, and extra virgin olive oil until smooth.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a lightly floured surface for 8 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let it rise at room temperature for 30 minutes.
While the dough rises, heat the vegetable oil in a small pan over medium heat and add ground cumin, coriander, and black pepper, stirring until fragrant, about 1 minute; remove from heat.
Gently fold the bhuna spice mixture into the risen dough, then shape the dough into a flatbread about 4cm thick.
Preheat the oven to 220°C (428°F) and place a baking stone or sheet inside to heat.
Bake the flatbread on the preheated stone for 10 minutes until the crust is golden and crisp.
Brush the hot flatbread with a little fresh dill if using, slice, and serve immediately.
